business.name: Sam Higgins Gas Plumbing and Heating
business.tagline: Your Local Gas and Heating Expert

sample_reviews.author: Karen M
sample_reviews.text: Sam was brilliant — arrived on time, diagnosed the boiler fault quickly and had it sorted within the hour. Very fair pricing too. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: David T
sample_reviews.text: Fantastic service from start to finish. Sam replaced our old boiler with a new combi and left everything spotless. Really trustworthy and professional.

sample_reviews.author: Rachel H
sample_reviews.text: Called Sam out for a gas safety check on our rental property. Turned up when he said he would and gave us a clear report. Will definitely use again.

brand.usp: Sam Higgins brings years of hands-on experience in gas, plumbing and heating to every job in Sheffield and surrounding areas, offering honest advice and reliable workmanship at competitive prices.
brand.hero_headline: Sheffield's Trusted Gas and Heating Specialist
brand.about_paragraph: I'm Sam Higgins, a Gas Safe registered plumber and heating engineer based in Burncross, Sheffield. I cover all aspects of gas work, boiler installations, and plumbing repairs for homeowners and landlords across Sheffield and the surrounding areas. I pride myself on turning up on time, getting the job done right first time, and always being straight with my customers about what they need.
